Mini Survey Analysis Report

Executive Summary

Respondents primarily cited pricing as the top barrier to trial conversion, followed by missing integrations.

Key Findings

The analysis of 142 responses surfaced three actionable themes: price sensitivity, integration gaps, and onboarding friction.

Per-question analysis

Q: What was the main barrier to upgrading?

Methodology

Responses collected via in-app survey widget. Holm correction applied across all cross-tab comparisons. No weighting applied.
